title: Bolloré Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bolloré Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
